song_name: Give Me Just One Night Una Noche
version_description: Have not found any tabs for this song on UG.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
Your lips keep tellin' me you want me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Hold me close all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
And I know deep inside you need me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
And no one else can make it right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Don't you try to hide your secrets[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
I can see it in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
You said the words without speaking[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Now I'm gonna make you mine[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
Give me just one night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
Una noche[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
A moment to be by your side[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
Give me just one night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
Una noche[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I'll give you the time of your life[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
The time of your li-----ife, Oh-oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I'll give you the time of your life,    oh baby yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Your eyes of passion make me crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Your existence makes me wild[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna loosen up your feelings[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
And see what's hiding inside[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
Give me just one night[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
Una noche[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I'll give you the time of your life[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
The time of your li-----ife, Oh-oh   yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
       Oooh  baby   yeah[/tab]

Oh---



[Bridge]
(Spoken with N.C. throughout keep a beat, bassline if you prefer)

me pone loca

tu movimiento

tu sentimiento
N.C.
si yo te quiero
N.C.
te doy la noche
N.C.
toda la noche
N.C.
Aye, vamos!
